case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. CHIKAKO KURAMOTO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHEL S. DEEB RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE AND CONTINUANCE REQUEST (TRANSACTION ID # 64522399) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-10-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66234511)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KURAMOTO, CHIKAKO DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-25-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-03-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-06-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-09-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
